title: Restore selected-row outline in Evaluations and Procedures tables
description:
## Problem
In the dashboard, selecting a row in the Items, Scorecards, and Data grids shows both a background highlight and an outline ring. Evaluations and Procedures currently only show the background highlight and are missing the outline ring.

## Expected Behavior
Evaluations and Procedures should render the same selected-row outline style as Items/Scorecards/Data.

## Scope
- Add missing selected-state outline for Evaluations grid
- Add missing selected-state outline for Procedures grid
- No behavior or interaction changes beyond the missing outline style

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting investigation for missing selected-row outline in Evaluations and Procedures dashboard grids. Next step: locate shared row selection styles and compare with Items/Scorecards/Data implementations.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented scoped UI fix for missing selection outline:
- Added new optional showSelectedOutline prop to Task component
- Applied selected-border-rounded only when variant=grid, selected, and showSelectedOutline=true
- Enabled this prop in EvaluationTask and ProcedureTask only

Validation:

- npm test -- --runInBand components/__tests__/ProcedureTask.optimizer-auth.test.tsx components/__tests__/TaskDisplay.test.tsx components/__tests__/EvaluationTask.memo.test.tsx (pass)
